# CI light dependency set (hermetic + engine-kb lanes; see docs/CI.md).
#
# = pyproject [project].dependencies MINUS the ML pair (sentence-transformers,
#   chromadb — only the acceptance/measure probe path needs them) PLUS the
#   [dev] extra (pytest stack).
#
# This is deliberately NOT `pip install .`: installing without the ML stack
# makes those lanes an import-hygiene canary — if engine/builder code grows a
# heavy import, the lanes go red (extends W0's de-hostage guarantee).
# If pyproject gains a NEW light dependency, add it here too; the drift fails
# loud (ImportError in CI), never silent.
mcp>=1.0.0
httpx>=0.25
numpy>=1.24.0
scikit-learn>=1.3.0
pyyaml
jsonschema
networkx>=3.0
rank-bm25>=0.2.2
pytest>=8
pytest-asyncio>=0.23
pytest-timeout>=2.2
